title: SynGO analysis
steps: Convert mouse Gene ID to human genes symbols with ID conversion tool
Copy converted genes symbols to the SynGO input section, select background as brain expressed, and name the experiment in the description
Start analysis and export data to Excel files
Open custom color-coding of SynGO ontologies
Provide GO term ID and -log10(GSEA 'gene cluster' FDR corrected p-value) in the input section, label for figure legend, and three values to create a color gradient suitable for the data.
Open a color-picker to change the color-coding of the data
creator: Chuyu Chen
